[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100010 2
1 11100110 5
2 00100101 3
3 10100010 3
4 00110001 3
5 11101001 5
6 11000010 3
7 01111001 5

70 07 11100111 6

57 75 11111111 a
60 06 00100111 4
71 17 11100110 5 match 1

72 27 11110111 7
